title: Willow — When Did You Last Do Something Just for You?
season_arc_note: Ep 4 of 6 — deepening. Theme: recharge and self-permission. Viewer is gently asked about their own needs. Arc moves from noticing (ep3) toward active tending.

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: Hey. You made it. That always means something to me.
When did you last do something just for you — not useful, not productive, just because it felt good?
beats.camera: Attentive, open posture, no contact staging

beats.speech_text: We outsource so much of our time. And then we wonder why we're running on empty. You're allowed to refill.
beats.camera: Slow micro-push, hands open and low
beats.sfw_note: Hands at open neutral gesture, no escalation

beats.speech_text: Think of one thing. Just one.
beats.camera: Hold — companion holds soft downward look then returns gaze

beats.speech_text: Whatever it is — that counts. Even if it's small. Especially if it's small.
beats.camera: Warm, static, no escalation in framing

beats.speech_text: Go do it if you can. I'll be here when you get back.
beats.camera: Companion settles, calm hold before fade
beats.sfw_note: Clean low-key close, no lingering intimate frame
